about.body: BlueDrop Plumbing is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Leak Detection & Repair
features: Find and fix leaks before they spread.

items.name: Bathroom Fitting
features: Complete fittings, neat finish, on schedule.

items.name: Emergency Callout
features: Rapid response when it can't wait.

items.a: Yes — same-day callouts for urgent leaks and burst pipes.
Site visits for quotes are free within our service area.
We cover the city and surrounding neighbourhoods.
